title: ceratocapnos claviculata
intro: Ceratocapnos claviculata, also known as the snow poppy or wolf's claw, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Papaveraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and as a sedative. The health benefits of Ceratocapnos claviculata include its ability to reduce inflammation, calm the nervous system, and exhibit antispasmodic properties. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in folk medicine for its potential to induce a peaceful and restful sleep.
